bug_report.summary: New Tab Top Sites: rightmost tile renders as a blank/empty card (no icon/label or “Add” placeholder)
steps_to_reproduce: Open a new tab to show the New Tab page (about:newtab).
expected_behaviors: Each Top Sites slot should render either a site tile (favicon + label) or the standard empty-slot/“Add” placeholder tile.
actual_behaviors: One Top Sites slot (rightmost in the row) appears as an empty white tile with no visible icon and no label (blank tile).

bug_report.summary: Password Manager navigation appends invalid URL fragment “#undefined” (about:logins#undefined)
steps_to_reproduce: Navigate to about:logins (e.g., type `about:logins` in the address bar and press Enter).
Observe the address bar URL after the page loads.
expected_behaviors: The URL should remain `about:logins` (or include a valid fragment/parameter representing a real, selected login).
actual_behaviors: The URL becomes `about:logins#undefined`, showing a literal “undefined” fragment in the address bar.

bug_report.summary: about:logins shows long percent-encoded fragment in the address bar after selecting/saving a login
steps_to_reproduce: Create a new login (e.g., https://example.org) and click Save so the login becomes selected.
expected_behaviors: The address bar should remain a clean `about:logins` URL (or use a stable, user-friendly URL format), without exposing an internal percent-encoded blob.
actual_behaviors: The address bar becomes `about:logins#%7B...%7D` (a long percent-encoded fragment), exposing internal selection data in the URL.

bug_report.summary: about:logins shows `#undefined` fragment in URL when opening Create New Login form
steps_to_reproduce: Open a new tab and navigate to `about:logins`.
Click the “Create New Login” (+) button to open the Create New Login form.
expected_behaviors: The URL should remain `about:logins` or use a valid fragment identifier (e.g., a real login id or a defined route), but should never include `#undefined`.
Copy/paste of the URL should not contain invalid fragments.
actual_behaviors: The address bar URL becomes `about:logins#undefined` while on the Create New Login page.

bug_report.summary: Saved-login suggestion row layout/padding changes unexpectedly (text appears shifted)
steps_to_reproduce: Go to https://www.saucedemo.com/ and focus the Password field so the saved-login suggestion dropdown appears.
Observe the saved-login suggestion row for the saved username (e.g., qa_user_gear_test).
expected_behaviors: Suggestion row content (icon/text alignment and padding) should remain consistent with prior UI unless the gear control is actually visible.
If a gear button is only shown on hover, the row should not look indented/misaligned when not hovered.
actual_behaviors: Suggestion row content appears shifted/indented differently in the after-change UI even when the gear control is not visible.
